narrative:
Liberty Twp. township has 1,148 registered voters, with 50.0% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 42.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 7.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.5 percentage points.
